Implementation of FlixelStackTraceProvider using Java's StackWalker.

FlixelJvmLogFileHandler - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.jvm.logging
JVM implementation of FlixelLogFileHandler that writes log lines to a timestamped .log file on a dedicated daemon thread.
FlixelJvmLogFileHandler() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.jvm.logging.FlixelJvmLogFileHandler
 
FlixelMiniAudioSoundHandler - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.jvm.audio
JVM implementation of FlixelSoundBackend.Factory backed by the MiniAudio native library.
FlixelMiniAudioSoundHandler() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.jvm.audio.FlixelMiniAudioSoundHandler
Creates the handler and initialises the MiniAudio engine.
